overview: Tele-Blast is a $15/month mobile-first CRM for sales agents, business funding brokers, and insurance agents. It features a power dialer, SMS blast with native template spinning, pipeline management, birthday and follow-up queues, and installable PWA for a native phone experience.
features: Power Dialer with SMS and calling
Native SMS template spinning with {{first_name}} merge tags
CSV import up to 500 leads per batch
PWA installable on iOS and Android
Admin panel with user management and CSV export
Affiliate program with referral tracking and payouts
SEO blog with comparison pages for buyer-intent traffic
Account creation attribution tracking (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google, social)
